meta.title: MyQuickPaste - Paste Your Frequent Text with One Click
meta.description: Tired of copying and pasting the same text over and over? MyQuickPaste is a lightweight Windows tool to save snippets, AI prompts, and templates. Free on Microsoft Store with a 14-day Pro trial.

hero.hook: Tired of copying and pasting the same text over and over?
hero.tagline: Save your frequent text and paste it with one click
hero.lead: MyQuickPaste is a lightweight Windows app that supercharges your daily copy-and-paste workflow. Store AI prompts, email templates, and code snippets, then paste them instantly into any app.
hero.ctaPrimary: Get it free on Microsoft Store
hero.ctaSecondary: Try all Pro features free for 14 days
hero.trust: Microsoft Store certified · Data encrypted locally on your PC

problem.title: Sound familiar?
items: Searching for the same ChatGPT prompt every time you need it
Retyping the same greetings and replies in email and chat
Hunting through Notepad for Excel formulas or IDs you use daily
problem.solution: With MyQuickPaste, save it once. Paste from a compact always-on-top window anytime, anywhere.

items.title: One-click paste
items.text: Paste saved text into any app instantly without breaking your flow.

items.title: Always within reach
items.text: Compact, always-on-top window. No more alt-tabbing just to copy and paste.

items.title: Private by design
items.text: Your snippets stay on your PC, encrypted locally. Nothing sent to the cloud.

items.title: Text slots
items.text: Organize across tabs A–E. Free: 10 slots. Pro unlocks more.

items.title: Clipboard history
items.text: Auto-save your last 20 copies (Pro). Recall past clips in seconds.

items.title: Quick transforms
items.text: Insert date, time, or change case before you paste with one tap.

items.title: 21-language UI
items.text: Interface available in 21 languages including English and Japanese.

items.title: AI and prompts
items.text: Save long ChatGPT and Claude prompts and reuse them with consistent quality.

items.title: Office and email
items.text: Store signatures, canned replies, and phrases by category.

items.title: Dev and Excel
items.text: Keep code snippets, formulas, paths, and IDs ready to insert.

items.title: Support and social
items.text: Drop FAQ answers and standard greetings into chat with one click.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.note: The base app is free. Pro is available as a Microsoft Store add-on.

cta.title: Stop wasting time on repetitive typing
cta.lead: Install in minutes. Start free and experience every Pro feature for 14 days.
